title: feat(sirius): itch.io compatibility fixes and UI enhancements
author: ChunkyPanda29

gist.headline: Next floor: itch.io
gist.blurb: The Sirius Cybernetics Elevator now successfully reaches itch.io without throwing 403 errors. We also added floor animations, because staring at a static wall while riding an elevator is just a bit too realistic.
gist.summary: Community contributor ChunkyPanda29 fixed itch.io deployment issues and added Lottie-based floor animations to the Sirius Cybernetics Elevator challenge.
gist.impact: Players get a smoother, glitch-free web experience with polished visual effects and background animations for each floor.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about an elevator game/app ('Sirius Cybernetics Elevator') getting itch.io compatibility and floor animations. Visuals should include a retro elevator interior, gaming vibes, and the pollinations bee enjoying the ride with the monitor robot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny bellhop hat and a chunky monitor-head robot riding a retro futuristic elevator with glowing floor numbers. The elevator interior features soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender lighting. Large visible pixels, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, warm lighting, cozy vibes like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
